Therefore SATURN+MERCURY+MARS which is aspected by
Moon. SATURN (KARMA) being in the house of Metai - and
aspected by Moon who is in the intellectual sign of Mercury.
Jupiter is in the II th from Saturn and hence the native will be a
respectable positioned guide or a Teacher/a Professor In technical
line.
And also 7'• aspects to this chart :
Mars in Aries, who is the husband and rear to Mars, Mars in East,
Dragon Tail in North., Dragon Head in South, thus indicating Mars
is in between Dragon Head and Dragon Tail.
Hence it indicates that the native during the first part of life cannot
get married., because Mars is under the control of Dragon Head
and Dragon Tail.
Upto the age of39 there is no possibility ofm arriage to the native.
